query: Vietnam population 2024 estimate population World Bank 2024
answer: Vietnam's population in 2024 is estimated at 101.0 million by the World Bank, showing a +0.6% increase from 2023. This ranks Vietnam #16 globally. The World Bank's data is based on national censuses and inter-censal estimates.

results.title: Viet Nam Population: 101.0M (2024) — Ranked #16 of 217 | Statistics of the World

Viet Nam's populationwas 101.0Min 2024, ranking #16 out of 217 countries.This represents a +0.6% change from 2023.Over the past 25 years, the highest recorded value was 101.0M (2024) and the lowest was 77.2M (2000).Data sourced from the World Bank World Development Indicators. Population data comes from national population censuses (typically conducted every 10 years) and inter-censal estimates produced by national statistical offices. The World Bank aggregates data from the United Nations Population Division, which harmonizes national data using demographic methods (cohort-component projection models).
